title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Store Manager in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd!
